title: ASCII Diagram Extraction with Logical Rules
scenario: Write a prompt that extracts a diagram of a company's organizational chart from a text description, where each employee has a unique name, title, and department, but only if the employee has a direct report. The description contains the following text: 'John Smith, CEO, Sales. Jane Doe, VP, Marketing. John Smith reports to: Jane Doe. Bob Johnson, Manager, Sales. Jane Doe reports to: John Smith.' The prompt should generate an ASCII diagram representing the organizational chart.
constraints: Must use logical rules to determine direct reports
Must extract employee information from the text description
Must generate an ASCII diagram representing the organizational chart

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt uses logical rules to determine direct reports and extracts employee information from the text description.
Verify that the generated ASCII diagram accurately represents the organizational chart.
Check if the generated prompt is syntactically valid and can be executed without errors.
